data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies user choice to improve decision-making times.
data.technical_spec: Within app navigation, presenting options in a clear manner.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design principle explaining the time required to move to a target area.
data.technical_spec: Consistent and large touch targets for mobile interfaces.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Allows users to visually group related elements for coherent understanding.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes proximity, similarity, and continuity in UI design.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users spend most of their time on other sites and prefer similar experiences.
data.technical_spec: Spotify's interface follows common music app conventions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Organizes information into chunks to handle human memory limits.
data.technical_spec: Playlists and albums as cognitive chunks in the app.
